data.title: Marvel Biosciences Wins NRC IRAP Support for Pediatric Liquid Form of Lead Neurodrug
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Marvel Biosciences Corp ( (TSE:MRVL) ) has issued an announcement.

Marvel Biosciences Corp. has secured advisory services and funding from Canada’s National Research Council Industrial Research Assistance Program to develop a pediatric-friendly liquid formulation of its lead compound, MB-204. The initiative targets children and adolescents with neurodevelopmental disorders such as autism spectrum disorder, Rett syndrome and Fragile X syndrome, who often struggle to swallow pills or rely on feeding tubes, limiting the use of conventional solid-dose medications.

The project will test multiple oral liquid approaches to produce a small-volume, stable and reproducible formulation that can be given via oral syringe or feeding tube without sacrificing drug exposure or consistency. By prioritizing child-appropriate dosing early, Marvel aims to improve treatment accessibility and adherence, ease the burden on families, support future pediatric clinical trials, and strengthen its intellectual property and position in patient-centric therapies while keeping high-value pharmaceutical R&D activity in Canada through local research partnerships.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MRVL) stock is a Sell with a C$0.14 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Marvel Biosciences Corp stock, see the TSE:MRVL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:MRVL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:MRVL is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, persistent losses/cash burn, and negative equity). Technicals also remain bearish with the stock below major moving averages and negative MACD. A positive corporate event (substantial warrant exercises) provides some financing relief, but it is not enough to offset the core balance-sheet and cash-burn risks.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:MRVL stock, click here.

More about Marvel Biosciences Corp

Marvel Biosciences Corp. is a Calgary-based biotechnology company focused on developing new treatments for neurological diseases and neurodevelopmental disorders. Its lead drug candidate, MB-204, is a novel fluorinated derivative of Istradefylline, an approved Parkinson’s therapy and the only adenosine A2A receptor blocker currently on the market, with potential applications in autism, depression, Alzheimer’s disease, Rett syndrome and Fragile X syndrome.

Average Trading Volume: 57,625

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$8.7M

data.title: Highway 50 Gold Plans $1.5 Million Private Placement to Advance Nevada Exploration
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Highway 50 Gold ( (TSE:HWY) ) has issued an update.

Highway 50 Gold Corp. has launched a non-brokered private placement to raise up to $1.5 million through the issuance of up to 3.75 million units at $0.40 per unit, each comprising one common share and a one-year warrant exercisable at $0.50. The financing, which remains subject to TSX Venture Exchange acceptance and includes a four-month hold on issued securities, will fund a drill program at the company’s Gold Knob project and provide general working capital, with finder’s fees potentially payable to arm’s length intermediaries.

The placement signals the company’s intention to advance exploration at Gold Knob and underpins its broader Nevada-focused strategy, although completion is contingent on regulatory approval and market participation. For stakeholders, the raise represents potential equity dilution offset by the prospect of value creation through targeted drilling and further de-risking of Highway 50 Gold’s exploration portfolio.

More about Highway 50 Gold

Highway 50 Gold Corp. is a mineral exploration-stage company focused on projects in Nevada and led by a team of experienced explorers and mine finders. The company’s exploration strategy is based on what management views as breakthroughs in understanding the crustal architecture of north-central Nevada, guiding its targeting and project development efforts.

Average Trading Volume: 32,507

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$15.75M

data.title: Carlyle Tactical Private Credit Fund Launches Preferred Stock Offering
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Carlyle Tactical Private Credit Fund L ( (TAKLX) ) has provided an update.

Carlyle Tactical Private Credit Fund is currently conducting a private offering of preferred stock to select institutional investors, aiming to raise additional capital to support its private credit investment activities. The fund notes that issuing preferred stock will increase leverage in its portfolio, which can magnify potential losses and entails greater effective leverage than the use of debt under the Investment Company Act of 1940, heightening risk for investors and signaling a more aggressive capital structure.

More about Carlyle Tactical Private Credit Fund L

Carlyle Tactical Private Credit Fund is an investment fund focused on private credit strategies, raising capital from institutional investors to build and manage a leveraged portfolio of credit assets. It operates under the Investment Company Act of 1940, which shapes how it can use instruments such as preferred stock and debt to enhance returns through leverage.

data.title: VCI Global Moves Into Execution Phase With Majority-Controlled RWA Digital Coupon Exchange
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from VCI Global Limited ( (VCIG) ).

On February 18, 2026, VCI Global said its blockchain arm Smart Bridge Technologies signed a definitive partnership agreement with Mezzofy Holding to build a Real-World Asset digital coupon exchange focused on tokenized vouchers. The structure gives Smart Bridge 51% control of the planned entity and regulatory and settlement leadership, while Mezzofy contributes its technology stack and multinational merchant network, aiming to plug into an existing enterprise ecosystem rather than rely on speculative retail demand.

The move marks a shift from development to commercial deployment in VCI Global’s digital asset strategy, positioning the exchange as a core infrastructure pillar expected to generate transaction fees, enterprise tokenization services and settlement revenues. By targeting the large but fragmented global digital voucher market and enabling secondary trading and price discovery for previously illiquid vouchers, the initiative could enhance VCI Global’s role as an early infrastructure provider in enterprise-focused digital commerce, though final capital commitments and the actual formation of the joint entity remain subject to further agreements and approvals.

The most recent analyst rating on (VCIG) stock is a Hold with a $0.46 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on VCI Global Limited stock, see the VCIG Stock Forecast page.

data.title: G. Willi-Food Sets March 24, 2026 Special Meeting to Vote on Executive Role, Services Pact and New External Director
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Willi Food Inte ( (WILC) ) has shared an update.

G. Willi-Food International has called a Special General Meeting of shareholders for March 24, 2026 in Yavne, Israel, according to a Form 6-K filed on February 18, 2026. Shareholders of record as of February 24, 2026 will be eligible to participate and vote, either in person or by proxy, with a quorum set at 25% of outstanding ordinary shares.

On the agenda are three key governance matters: approval of the terms of office for Mrs. Karin Williger as head of business optimization and business development effective January 1, 2026, a three-year extension of the services agreement with controlling shareholder Willi-Food Investments Ltd. from January 1, 2026, and the election of Ms. Michal Fishler Mund as an external director for a three-year term starting June 1, 2026. These votes could shape the company’s leadership structure and its relationship with its controlling shareholder, with special approval thresholds applying to related-party and external director items under Israeli corporate law.

The most recent analyst rating on (WILC) stock is a Buy with a $33.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Willi Food Inte stock, see the WILC Stock Forecast page.

Willi Food Inte’s strong financial performance and technical indicators are the primary drivers of its high score. The stock’s attractive valuation further supports its investment appeal. However, the lack of earnings call data and corporate events limits additional insights.

To see Spark’s full report on WILC stock, click here.

More about Willi Food Inte

data.title: Major Spir Group Shareholders Transfer 57 Million Shares to Bidco Clover
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Sikri Holding AS ( (DE:57U0) ) is now available.

Bidco Clover AS has launched a voluntary cash offer to acquire all outstanding shares in Spir Group ASA that it does not already control, at an offer price of NOK 8.567 per share, following several extensions of the offer period and a final result announcement in mid-February 2026. In a significant reshaping of Spir Group’s ownership, major shareholders Karbon Invest AS and Varner Kapital AS, both linked to primary insiders on the company’s board, will transfer a combined 57.4 million shares to the bidder, tightening Bidco Clover’s control and signaling a potential change in governance and strategic direction for the company’s stakeholders.

More about Sikri Holding AS

Spir Group ASA operates in the Norwegian market, where its shares are listed on Euronext Oslo. The company’s ownership structure includes several prominent investment entities and insiders, reflecting strong interest from financial investors in its equity.

data.title: CCFNB Bancorp Announces Regular and Special Cash Dividends
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

CCFNB Bancorp ( (CCFN) ) just unveiled an update.

On February 18, 2026, Muncy Columbia Financial Corporation’s board declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.46 per share for the first quarter of 2026, payable March 19, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 4. The board also approved a special one-time cash dividend of $1.00 per share, payable April 23, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 8, continuing the company’s practice of supplementing recurring payouts with occasional special distributions.

The announcement highlighted record 2025 earnings of $24.2 million, or $6.85 per share, up from $19.0 million, or $5.33 per share, in 2024, alongside improved returns on assets and equity. Capital and credit metrics also strengthened, with book value per share rising 15.6% to $54.44, the bank’s Tier 1 leverage ratio increasing to 9.93%, and past-due loans falling to 1.11%, supporting management’s message that the institution is financially strong and well-positioned to navigate market challenges while continuing to reward shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (CCFN) stock is a Buy with a $65.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CCFNB Bancorp stock, see the CCFN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CCFN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CCFN is a Outperform.

CCFNB Bancorp’s overall stock score is driven by strong financial performance and attractive valuation. The company’s solid profitability, effective leverage management, and robust cash flow generation underpin its financial health. Positive technical indicators and a recent dividend increase further enhance its investment appeal. However, attention is needed on the decreasing gross profit margin and historical leverage levels.

To see Spark’s full report on CCFN stock, click here.

More about CCFNB Bancorp

Muncy Columbia Financial Corporation is a community-focused financial holding company operating Journey Bank, which provides traditional banking services to local customers. The institution concentrates on steady growth, disciplined credit underwriting, and maintaining capital ratios above well-capitalized regulatory thresholds while serving the banking needs of its regional communities.

The company’s strategy emphasizes returning excess capital to shareholders through regular and special cash dividends, supported by strengthened earnings and balance sheet metrics. Following its 2023 merger with Muncy Bank Financial, Inc., the corporation has focused on integrating operations and enhancing capital and liquidity, enabling it to increase shareholder distributions while preserving financial resilience.

President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Storebrand ASA ( (GB:0NO0) ) just unveiled an update.

Storebrand ASA has transferred 90,064 treasury shares to members of its management as part of its remuneration scheme in which a portion of executive pay is settled in equity at a price of NOK 176.56 per share. Following these transactions, the company holds 11,823,447 of its own shares, corresponding to 2.72% of its share capital, underscoring ongoing use of share-based incentives to align management with shareholder interests.

The awards increased the individual shareholdings of several primary insiders, including chief executive Odd Arild Grefstad and other senior executives, further consolidating management’s ownership stake in the group. The move signals Storebrand’s continued reliance on equity-linked compensation as a tool for retention and alignment, which may support governance standards and investor confidence in the Nordic financial group’s long-term strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0NO0) stock is a Sell with a NOK150.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Storebrand ASA stock, see the GB:0NO0 Stock Forecast page.

More about Storebrand ASA

Storebrand ASA is a Nordic financial group focused on insurance, pensions, savings and other financial services aimed at delivering security and financial wellness for individuals and companies. The company emphasizes sustainable solutions and long-term economic decision-making, serves about 61,000 corporate and 2.6 million individual customers, manages NOK 1,609 billion in assets and is headquartered at Lysaker near Oslo, with its shares listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker STB.

data.title: Cresud Announces Final Warrant Exercise Window and Cashless Option
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Cresud Sociedad ( (CRESY) ).

On February 18, 2026, Cresud informed investors that the final exercise window for its share warrants will run from February 17 to February 25, 2026, with intermediaries such as Caja de Valores potentially imposing earlier internal cut-off dates for receiving exercise instructions. Each warrant entitles the holder to receive 1.5417 common shares with a par value of ARS 1 at an exercise price of USD 0.3669 per share, allowing warrant holders to finalize their position in Cresud equity.

For this last exercise period, the company is offering a “Net Exercise with Par Value Contribution” cashless alternative approved at the shareholders’ meeting on October 30, 2025, under which holders receive shares equal to the difference between the cash exercise price and the reference market value while paying only the ARS 1 par value per share. In the case of converting common shares into ADSs, investors will also pay the ADS issuance fee of USD 0.05 per ADS, a structure that could ease capital outlay for warrant holders and potentially support an increase in Cresud’s outstanding share capital and market liquidity.

The most recent analyst rating on (CRESY) stock is a Hold with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cresud Sociedad stock, see the CRESY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CRESY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CRESY is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by attractive valuation (very low P/E and high dividend yield) alongside improving recent operating and cash-flow performance. This is tempered by elevated leverage and historical volatility, and near-term technicals that remain weak versus short-term moving averages.

To see Spark’s full report on CRESY stock, click here.

Cresud Sociedad Anónima, Comercial, Inmobiliaria, Financiera y Agropecuaria (Cresud Inc. in English) is an Argentine company listed on Nasdaq and BYMA that operates across agricultural, real estate, financial and related businesses. Through its diversified portfolio, Cresud provides investors exposure to Argentina’s agribusiness and property sectors, with its shares also represented by ADSs in international markets.

data.title: Satellos to Host February 24 Virtual KOL Event Showcasing SAT-3247 in Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Satellos Bioscience ( (TSE:MSCL) ) has provided an announcement.

On February 18, 2026, Satellos Bioscience Inc. announced it will host a virtual key opinion leader event on February 24, 2026, featuring neuromuscular expert Dr. Kevin M. Flanigan to discuss the unmet need and current treatment landscape in Duchenne muscular dystrophy. The event will highlight clinical progress for SAT-3247, including Phase 1a/b data in healthy volunteers and adults with DMD, the TRAILHEAD open-label adult study, and the BASECAMP randomized Phase 2 pediatric trial, underscoring Satellos’ efforts to position SAT-3247 as a potentially disease-modifying, dystrophin-independent therapy in a competitive DMD market.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MSCL) stock is a Buy with a C$16.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Satellos Bioscience stock, see the TSE:MSCL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:MSCL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:MSCL is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (pre-revenue, large losses, and heavy cash burn with ongoing funding risk). Technicals are supportive due to a clear uptrend, but overbought signals temper that strength. Valuation is also constrained by negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:MSCL stock, click here.

More about Satellos Bioscience

Satellos Bioscience Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing orally administered small molecule medicines to restore natural muscle repair and regeneration in degenerative muscle diseases. Its lead candidate, SAT-3247, targets the AAK1 protein to address disrupted muscle stem-cell signaling in Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) and is being evaluated in ongoing Phase 2 clinical trials in adult and pediatric patients.
